zh.lifeSummary: 當Dorothy Symonds於1594年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可維布亞德時，她的父親John Symonds28歲，母親F Symonds23歲。她於1612年與Nathaniel Fiske在英國英格蘭素福爾可維布亞德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1678年10月12日在她的家鄉享年84歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可維布亞德聖 安德也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dorothy Symonds于1594年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可維布亞德时，她的父亲John Symonds28岁，母亲F Symonds23岁。她于1612年与Nathaniel Fiske在英国英格兰素福爾可維布亞德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1678年10月12日在她的家乡享年84岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可維布亞德聖 安德也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Symonds
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Simmons , with excrescent -d.

variants.name: Simmons
meanings: English (southeastern): variant of Simon , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Dorothy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothee
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothie
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

en.lifeSummary: When Dorothy Symonds was born in 1594, in Weybread, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Symonds, was 28 and her mother, F Symonds, was 23. She married Nathaniel Fiske in 1612, in Weybread, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 12 October 1678, in her hometown, at the age of 84, and was buried in St Andrew's Church, Weybread, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dorothy Symonds est née en 1594, à Weybread, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Symonds, avait 28 ans et sa mère, F Symonds, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Nathaniel Fiske en 1612, à Weybread, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 octobre 1678, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterrée à St Andrew's Church, Weybread, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dorothy Symonds 1594 in Weybread, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Symonds 28 und ihre Mutter F Symonds 23. Sie hat 1612 in Weybread, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Nathaniel Fiske geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. Oktober 1678 im Alter von 84 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in St Andrew's Church, Weybread, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dorothy Symonds è nata il nel 1594 nel Weybread, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Symonds, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, F Symonds, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Nathaniel Fiske nel 1612, nel Weybread, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 12 ottobre 1678, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolta a St Andrew's Church, Weybread, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Dorothy Symondsが1594年にイギリスイギリススフォルクウエイブレアドで生まれた時，父John Symondsは28歳，母F Symondsは23歳であった。1612年にイギリスイギリススフォルクウエイブレアドでNathaniel Fiskeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1678年10月12日に故郷で84歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクウエイブレアドスト アンドリュー'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Chignal St. James,Essex,England: 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 치그널 스트 자메스
ko.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운
ko.Saint Andrew's Church, Weybread, Mid Suf: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 w이브리드 스트 앤드루'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Dorothy Symonds(이)가 1594년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 w이브리드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Symonds(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 F Symonds(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1612년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 w이브리드에서 Nathaniel Fiske(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1678년 10월 12일 그녀의 고향에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 w이브리드 스트 앤드루'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dorothy Symonds nasceu em 1594, em Weybread, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Symonds, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, F Symonds, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Nathaniel Fiske em 1612, em Weybread, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de outubro de 1678, em sua cidade natal, com 84 anos, e foi sepultada em St Andrew's Church, Weybread, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dorothy Symonds родилась в 1594 г. в местности вибрид, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Symonds было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали F Symonds, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nathaniel Fiske в 1612 г. в местности вибрид, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 12 октября 1678 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 84 лет и была похоронена в местности ст андрю'с чурч, вибрид, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dorothy Symonds nació en 1594, en Weybread, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Symonds, tenía 28 años y su mamá, F Symonds, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Nathaniel Fiske en 1612, en Weybread, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 12 de octubre de 1678, en su pueblo, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultada en St Andrew's Church, Weybread, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
